rationale: The cited paper appears in a grouped introductory citation (with Gupta and Lehmann 2005 and Zhang et al. 2014) to illustrate prior CRM work using customer databases in salaried-marketer settings. The citing paper does not discuss Li et al. (2011) separately, does not build hypotheses from its mechanisms, and does not reuse its model or decision framework. Its role is background positioning of the literature rather than a distinct functional input to the study.
